stemHtml:
An operator is scheduled to operate a commercial flight from EGBB to LCPH using a medium jet transport aeroplane. An en-route alternate for contingency fuel has been nominated. Using the operational flight plan extracts below, calculate the minimum required take-off fuel.

Route dist: 1879 NM
Air dist: 1766 NM
Great circle dist: 1805 NM 
Estimated flight time: 4 hr 07 min
Estimated flight time to alternate: 23 min
Avg fuel flow: 3109 kg/h 
Holding fuel flow: 2694 kg/h
